name: Piri Piri Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Select 2 to 6 chili peppers based on desired heat level and taste preference.
2. Remove stems from the peppers and coarsely chop them, including the seeds.
3. Combine chopped peppers, salt, olive oil, and vinegar in a 1 pint jar with a tight-fitting lid.
4. Securely cover the jar and shake well to combine all ingredients.
5. Refrigerate until ready to use.
